query:
-- 查询user_role_cities数据
SELECT * FROM user_role_cities WHERE userId = 526;

-- 查询partner_cities数据  
SELECT pc.*, c.name as cityName
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE pc.partnerId = 30002;
